body: PT Cimanggis Cibitung Tollways (CCT) has been assigned an "ida" rating by Pemeringkat Efek Indonesia (PEFINDO) due to its strong economy and operating cash flow visibility, but limited by weak financial profile and traffic volume volatility. Meanwhile, PT Buana Finance TBK (BBLD) received a rating of "bbld" from PEFINDO, driven by strong capital support and adequate liquidity, but constrained by moderate profitability and asset quality.
title: Pemeringkat Efek Indonesia assigns credit ratings to PT Cimanggis Cibitung Tollways and PT Buana Finance TBK, citing strengths and weaknesses in their financial profiles.

body: PT Barito Renewables Energy Tbk (BREN) has complied with the free float regulation, with 11.66% of its total shares or 15.6 billion shares available, exceeding the minimum 7.5% requirement. However, BREN will be removed from the FTSE Global Equity Indonesia Index on September 25, 2024, due to high shareholder concentration, with four major shareholders controlling 95.97% of its shares.
title: Barito Renewable Energy Complies with Free Float Regulation, Exceeds Minimum Requirement, but to be Removed from FTSE Russell Index

body: PT PP TBK has set aside IDR250 billion to repay its shelf registration bonds, Series B, which will mature on November 27, 2024, with the funds coming from the company's internal cash reserves of IDR4.33 trillion as of June 2024. The bonds, rated IDA+ with an 8.5% annual interest coupon, are part of PT PP TBK's total debt obligations, which include IDR1.71 trillion in short-term sukuk mudharabah debts and IDR2.08 trillion in long-term bonds.
title: PTPP Prepares IDR250 Billion to Repay Shelf Registration Bonds Due in 2024

body: PT Adhi Kartiko Pratama Tbk, a nickel mining issuer listed on the Indonesia Stock Exchange, reported a net profit of IDR2.33 billion in Q1 2024, a 90.3% decline from IDR24.07 billion in the same quarter last year, due to a decline in sales to IDR136.32 billion from IDR180.05 billion. As of March 31, 2024, the company had total assets of IDR322.39 billion, cash and cash equivalents of IDR94.35 billion, and total equity of IDR143.05 billion.
title: Adhi Kartiko Pratama's Net Profit Plummets 90% in Q1 2024 Due to Weak Sales Performance.

body: PT Green Power Battery (GPB) has obtained its first qualification to produce electric vehicle battery packs and targets to complete overall production qualification by October 2024, with equipment supplies already received. GPB has also signed a cooperation agreement with PT Gotion Indonesia Materials, securing contracts worth IDR 139 billion (approximately USD 9.2 million) to supply 37,160 electric motorcycle batteries.
title: PT Green Power Battery to Begin Electric Vehicle Battery Production After Obtaining Qualification

body: PT Barito Renewables Energy Tbk has announced plans to increase its energy capacity by 102.6 megawatts through new plant expansions and capacity upgrades, with a total investment value of approximately 124.45 megawatts. The projects, including Salak Unit 7 and Wayang Windu Unit 3, are expected to boost efficiency and capacity, with partners such as Fuji Electric Co. Ltd. and Mitsubishi Power Indonesia contributing to the upgrades.
title: PT Barito Renewables Energy wins tender to increase energy capacity of Star Energy Geothermal by 102.6 megawatt through new plant expansions and upgrades.

body: PT Mulia Boga Raya Tbk, a processed food manufacturer, will offer 5,988,400 treasury shares acquired from a buyback held from April 24 to August 12, 2024, with a potential fundraising of IDR 10.45 billion. The shares will be sold or transferred outside the stock exchange through negotiation, with five unaffiliated parties expressing interest in acquiring the entirety of the treasury stock.
title: PT Mulia Boga Raya to Sell 5.99 Million Treasury Shares Acquired from Buyback.

body: PT Summarecon Agung Tbk, a real estate developer, reported a net profit of IDR 753.68 billion in the first half of 2024, a 70.5% year-on-year increase from IDR 442.04 billion in the same period last year. The company's net revenue reached IDR 5.67 trillion, up 89.6% year-on-year, driven primarily by its property development business, which contributed IDR 4.18 trillion to total revenue.
title: PT Summarecon Agung's Net Profit Surges 70.5% to IDR 753.68 Billion in First Half 2024

body: PT Lippo Karawaci Tbk (LPKR) has divested 18.57% of its shares in PT Siloam Hospitals Tbk, reducing its stake from 38.66% to 29.09%, and generating IDR 6.9 trillion in fresh funds, which will be used to pay back IDR 3.9 trillion in loans and invest in real estate projects. As a result, LPKR's net debt is expected to decrease by IDR 4.3 trillion, while Siloam's shares have risen 3.37% to IDR 3,070 per share, marking a 42.13% increase since the beginning of the year.
title: Lippo Karawaci divests 18.57% of Siloam Hospitals shares to reduce debt and focus on real estate sector.
